# GitBase<T>.GitBaseAsset class

Namespace: [`Velopack.Sources`](./index.md)

Provides a wrapper around [`VelopackAsset`](../Velopack/VelopackAsset.md) which also contains a Git Release.

```cs
protected record GitBase<T>.GitBaseAsset : VelopackAsset, IEquatable<VelopackAsset>, IEquatable<GitBase<T>.GitBaseAsset>
```

**Inherits:** [`VelopackAsset`](../Velopack/VelopackAsset.md)
